name: doc-defaults-spacing
description: docDefaults sets spacing after=200 line=276. Style sets only before=120. Tests three-level fallback: direct > style > docDefaults.
expected_behavior: Para 1: after=200, line=276 (docDefaults). Para 2: before=120 (style), after=200 (docDefaults), line=276 (docDefaults). Para 3: before=0 (direct), after=200 (docDefaults), line=276 (docDefaults).
